evals.prompt: add a new atom called Badge
evals.expected_output: Creates components/atoms/badge.tsx, updates atoms/index.ts barrel, creates app/stories/atoms/badge.tsx story, adds Badge to Atoms category in stories index (alphabetically sorted), adds registry.json entry with atomicLevel atom.

assertions.text: Creates components/atoms/badge.tsx with Badge component, cn() import, className prop, and named exports
Appends export { Badge } and export type { BadgeProps } to components/atoms/index.ts
Creates app/stories/atoms/badge.tsx with StorySection wrapper and ScrollView
Adds { name: 'Badge', href: '/stories/atoms/badge' } to Atoms category in app/stories/index.tsx, alphabetically sorted
Adds entry to registry.json with name: badge, type: registry:ui, atomicLevel: atom, files pointing to components/atoms/badge.tsx
Atom component file uses kebab-case filename (badge.tsx not Badge.tsx)
Atom is a flat file, NOT inside a badge/ folder

evals.prompt: create a molecule for player card
evals.expected_output: Creates components/molecules/player-card/ folder with PlayerCard.tsx and index.ts, updates molecules barrel, creates story, updates stories index, adds registry entry.

assertions.text: Creates components/molecules/player-card/ directory
Main component file is PascalCase: PlayerCard.tsx
Creates components/molecules/player-card/index.ts re-exporting PlayerCard
Appends export to components/molecules/index.ts
Creates app/stories/molecules/player-card.tsx with correct import path
Adds entry to Molecules category in stories index
Registry entry files array includes both PlayerCard.tsx and index.ts paths
Registry entry has atomicLevel: molecule

evals.prompt: add a new organism called draft board
evals.expected_output: Creates components/organisms/draft-board/ folder with DraftBoard.tsx and index.ts, updates organisms barrel, creates story, updates stories index, adds registry entry with atomicLevel organism.

assertions.text: Creates components/organisms/draft-board/ directory
Main component file is DraftBoard.tsx
Creates components/organisms/draft-board/index.ts
Appends export to components/organisms/index.ts
Creates app/stories/organisms/draft-board.tsx
Adds entry to Organisms category in stories index
Registry entry has atomicLevel: organism

evals.prompt: add an atom called stat-bar that needs static scoring categories data
evals.expected_output: Creates the atom component plus a lib/data/stat-bar.json data file and a separate registry entry for the data, with the component registry entry referencing the data as a registryDependency.

assertions.text: Creates components/atoms/stat-bar.tsx
Creates lib/data/stat-bar.json (or prompts user for data content)
Adds separate registry entry with name: stat-bar-data, type: registry:lib
Component registry entry includes http://localhost:3999/r/stat-bar-data.json in registryDependencies
Also creates story, updates barrel, updates stories index, adds component registry entry

evals.prompt: audit my component structure and tell me what's wrong
evals.expected_output: This should NOT trigger dn3-add-component skill. It should trigger atomic-design instead.

assertions.text: Does NOT scaffold any new component files
Does NOT modify registry.json
